meta.description: Block-to-Python mapping for backtesting.py strategy generation

helper_functions.EMA:
def EMA(values, n):
    """Exponential Moving Average"""
    values = np.asarray(values)
    alpha = 2 / (n + 1)
    ema = np.zeros_like(values, dtype=float)
    ema[0] = values[0]
    for i in range(1, len(values)):
        ema[i] = alpha * values[i] + (1 - alpha) * ema[i-1]
    return ema
helper_functions.RSI:
def RSI(values, period=14):
    """Relative Strength Index"""
    values = np.asarray(values)
    deltas = np.diff(values)
    gains = np.where(deltas > 0, deltas, 0)
    losses = np.where(deltas < 0, -deltas, 0)
    avg_gain = np.zeros(len(values))
    avg_loss = np.zeros(len(values))
    if period < len(values):
        avg_gain[period] = np.mean(gains[:period])
        avg_loss[period] = np.mean(losses[:period])
    for i in range(period + 1, len(values)):
        avg_gain[i] = (avg_gain[i-1] * (period - 1) + gains[i-1]) / period
        avg_loss[i] = (avg_loss[i-1] * (period - 1) + losses[i-1]) / period
    rs = avg_gain / (avg_loss + 1e-10)
    rsi = 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))
    rsi[:period] = 50
    return rsi
helper_functions.ATR:
def ATR(high, low, close, period=14):
    """Average True Range"""
    high = np.asarray(high, dtype=float)
    low = np.asarray(low, dtype=float)
    close = np.asarray(close, dtype=float)
    tr = np.zeros_like(close)
    tr[0] = high[0] - low[0]
    for i in range(1, len(close)):
        hl = high[i] - low[i]
        hc = abs(high[i] - close[i-1])
        lc = abs(low[i] - close[i-1])
        tr[i] = max(hl, hc, lc)
    atr = np.zeros_like(tr)
    atr[:period] = np.mean(tr[:period])
    alpha = 2 / (period + 1)
    for i in range(period, len(tr)):
        atr[i] = alpha * tr[i] + (1 - alpha) * atr[i-1]
    return atr
helper_functions.BollingerUpper:
def BollingerUpper(values, period=20, std_dev=2.0):
    """Bollinger Upper Band"""
    values = np.asarray(values)
    result = np.zeros_like(values)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(values)):
        window = values[i - period + 1:i + 1]
        result[i] = np.mean(window) + std_dev * np.std(window)
    return result
helper_functions.BollingerLower:
def BollingerLower(values, period=20, std_dev=2.0):
    """Bollinger Lower Band"""
    values = np.asarray(values)
    result = np.zeros_like(values)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(values)):
        window = values[i - period + 1:i + 1]
        result[i] = np.mean(window) - std_dev * np.std(window)
    return result
helper_functions.BollingerMiddle:
def BollingerMiddle(values, period=20):
    """Bollinger Middle Band (SMA)"""
    values = np.asarray(values)
    result = np.zeros_like(values)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(values)):
        result[i] = np.mean(values[i - period + 1:i + 1])
    return result
helper_functions.StochK:
def StochK(high, low, close, period=14):
    """Stochastic %K"""
    high = np.asarray(high)
    low = np.asarray(low)
    close = np.asarray(close)
    k = np.zeros_like(close)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(close)):
        hh = np.max(high[i - period + 1:i + 1])
        ll = np.min(low[i - period + 1:i + 1])
        k[i] = 100 * (close[i] - ll) / (hh - ll + 1e-10)
    return k
helper_functions.StochD:
def StochD(high, low, close, k_period=14, d_period=3):
    """Stochastic %D"""
    k = StochK(high, low, close, k_period)
    d = np.zeros_like(k)
    for i in range(d_period - 1, len(k)):
        d[i] = np.mean(k[i - d_period + 1:i + 1])
    return d
helper_functions.CCI:
def CCI(high, low, close, period=20):
    """Commodity Channel Index"""
    high = np.asarray(high, dtype=float)
    low = np.asarray(low, dtype=float)
    close = np.asarray(close, dtype=float)
    tp = (high + low + close) / 3
    cci = np.zeros_like(close)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(close)):
        window = tp[i - period + 1:i + 1]
        sma = np.mean(window)
        mad = np.mean(np.abs(window - sma))
        cci[i] = (tp[i] - sma) / (0.015 * mad + 1e-10)
    return cci
helper_functions.WilliamsR:
def WilliamsR(high, low, close, period=14):
    """Williams %R"""
    high = np.asarray(high, dtype=float)
    low = np.asarray(low, dtype=float)
    close = np.asarray(close, dtype=float)
    wr = np.zeros_like(close)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(close)):
        hh = np.max(high[i - period + 1:i + 1])
        ll = np.min(low[i - period + 1:i + 1])
        wr[i] = -100 * (hh - close[i]) / (hh - ll + 1e-10)
    return wr
helper_functions.ADX:
def ADX(high, low, close, period=14):
    """Average Directional Index"""
    high = np.asarray(high, dtype=float)
    low = np.asarray(low, dtype=float)
    close = np.asarray(close, dtype=float)
    n = len(close)
    tr = np.zeros(n)
    plus_dm = np.zeros(n)
    minus_dm = np.zeros(n)
    tr[0] = high[0] - low[0]
    for i in range(1, n):
        tr[i] = max(high[i] - low[i], abs(high[i] - close[i-1]), abs(low[i] - close[i-1]))
        up = high[i] - high[i-1]
        down = low[i-1] - low[i]
        plus_dm[i] = up if up > down and up > 0 else 0
        minus_dm[i] = down if down > up and down > 0 else 0
    atr = np.zeros(n)
    plus_di = np.zeros(n)
    minus_di = np.zeros(n)
    atr[period] = np.sum(tr[1:period+1])
    plus_dm_sum = np.sum(plus_dm[1:period+1])
    minus_dm_sum = np.sum(minus_dm[1:period+1])
    for i in range(period + 1, n):
        atr[i] = atr[i-1] - atr[i-1]/period + tr[i]
        plus_dm_sum = plus_dm_sum - plus_dm_sum/period + plus_dm[i]
        minus_dm_sum = minus_dm_sum - minus_dm_sum/period + minus_dm[i]
        plus_di[i] = 100 * plus_dm_sum / (atr[i] + 1e-10)
        minus_di[i] = 100 * minus_dm_sum / (atr[i] + 1e-10)
    dx = np.zeros(n)
    adx = np.zeros(n)
    for i in range(period, n):
        dx[i] = 100 * abs(plus_di[i] - minus_di[i]) / (plus_di[i] + minus_di[i] + 1e-10)
    adx[2*period] = np.mean(dx[period:2*period+1])
    for i in range(2*period + 1, n):
        adx[i] = (adx[i-1] * (period - 1) + dx[i]) / period
    return adx
helper_functions.SuperTrend:
def SuperTrend(high, low, close, period=10, multiplier=3.0):
    """SuperTrend indicator"""
    high = np.asarray(high, dtype=float)
    low = np.asarray(low, dtype=float)
    close = np.asarray(close, dtype=float)
    atr = ATR(high, low, close, period)
    hl2 = (high + low) / 2
    upper = hl2 + multiplier * atr
    lower = hl2 - multiplier * atr
    supertrend = np.zeros_like(close)
    direction = np.ones_like(close)
    supertrend[0] = upper[0]
    for i in range(1, len(close)):
        if close[i] > upper[i-1]:
            direction[i] = 1
        elif close[i] < lower[i-1]:
            direction[i] = -1
        else:
            direction[i] = direction[i-1]
        if direction[i] == 1:
            supertrend[i] = lower[i]
        else:
            supertrend[i] = upper[i]
    return supertrend
helper_functions.DonchianUpper:
def DonchianUpper(high, period=20):
    """Donchian Channel Upper"""
    high = np.asarray(high, dtype=float)
    result = np.zeros_like(high)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(high)):
        result[i] = np.max(high[i - period + 1:i + 1])
    return result
helper_functions.DonchianLower:
def DonchianLower(low, period=20):
    """Donchian Channel Lower"""
    low = np.asarray(low, dtype=float)
    result = np.zeros_like(low)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(low)):
        result[i] = np.min(low[i - period + 1:i + 1])
    return result
helper_functions.KeltnerUpper:
def KeltnerUpper(high, low, close, period=20, multiplier=2.0):
    """Keltner Channel Upper"""
    ema = EMA(close, period)
    atr = ATR(high, low, close, period)
    return ema + multiplier * atr
helper_functions.KeltnerLower:
def KeltnerLower(high, low, close, period=20, multiplier=2.0):
    """Keltner Channel Lower"""
    ema = EMA(close, period)
    atr = ATR(high, low, close, period)
    return ema - multiplier * atr
helper_functions.MFI:
def MFI(high, low, close, volume, period=14):
    """Money Flow Index"""
    high = np.asarray(high, dtype=float)
    low = np.asarray(low, dtype=float)
    close = np.asarray(close, dtype=float)
    volume = np.asarray(volume, dtype=float)
    tp = (high + low + close) / 3
    mf = tp * volume
    mfi = np.zeros_like(close)
    for i in range(period, len(close)):
        pos_mf = 0
        neg_mf = 0
        for j in range(i - period + 1, i + 1):
            if tp[j] > tp[j-1]:
                pos_mf += mf[j]
            elif tp[j] < tp[j-1]:
                neg_mf += mf[j]
        mfi[i] = 100 - 100 / (1 + pos_mf / (neg_mf + 1e-10))
    return mfi
helper_functions.Momentum:
def Momentum(close, period=14):
    """Momentum"""
    close = np.asarray(close, dtype=float)
    mom = np.zeros_like(close)
    for i in range(period, len(close)):
        mom[i] = close[i] - close[i - period]
    return mom
helper_functions.DEMA:
def DEMA(values, period=14):
    """Double EMA"""
    ema1 = EMA(values, period)
    ema2 = EMA(ema1, period)
    return 2 * ema1 - ema2
helper_functions.TEMA:
def TEMA(values, period=14):
    """Triple EMA"""
    ema1 = EMA(values, period)
    ema2 = EMA(ema1, period)
    ema3 = EMA(ema2, period)
    return 3 * ema1 - 3 * ema2 + ema3
helper_functions.LWMA:
def LWMA(values, period=14):
    """Linear Weighted Moving Average"""
    values = np.asarray(values, dtype=float)
    result = np.zeros_like(values)
    weights = np.arange(1, period + 1)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(values)):
        window = values[i - period + 1:i + 1]
        result[i] = np.sum(window * weights) / np.sum(weights)
    return result
helper_functions.SMMA:
def SMMA(values, period=14):
    """Smoothed Moving Average"""
    values = np.asarray(values, dtype=float)
    result = np.zeros_like(values)
    result[period-1] = np.mean(values[:period])
    for i in range(period, len(values)):
        result[i] = (result[i-1] * (period - 1) + values[i]) / period
    return result
helper_functions.Ichimoku_Tenkan:
def Ichimoku_Tenkan(high, low, period=9):
    """Ichimoku Tenkan-sen"""
    high = np.asarray(high, dtype=float)
    low = np.asarray(low, dtype=float)
    result = np.zeros_like(high)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(high)):
        result[i] = (np.max(high[i - period + 1:i + 1]) + np.min(low[i - period + 1:i + 1])) / 2
    return result
helper_functions.Ichimoku_SenkouA:
def Ichimoku_SenkouA(high, low, tenkan_period=9, kijun_period=26):
    """Ichimoku Senkou Span A"""
    tenkan = Ichimoku_Tenkan(high, low, tenkan_period)
    kijun = Ichimoku_Kijun(high, low, kijun_period)
    return (tenkan + kijun) / 2
helper_functions.Highest:
def Highest(values, period=20):
    """Highest value over period"""
    values = np.asarray(values, dtype=float)
    result = np.zeros_like(values)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(values)):
        result[i] = np.max(values[i - period + 1:i + 1])
    return result
helper_functions.Lowest:
def Lowest(values, period=20):
    """Lowest value over period"""
    values = np.asarray(values, dtype=float)
    result = np.zeros_like(values)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(values)):
        result[i] = np.min(values[i - period + 1:i + 1])
    return result
helper_functions.PlusDI:
def PlusDI(high, low, close, period=14):
    """Plus Directional Indicator"""
    high = np.asarray(high, dtype=float)
    low = np.asarray(low, dtype=float)
    close = np.asarray(close, dtype=float)
    n = len(close)
    tr = np.zeros(n)
    plus_dm = np.zeros(n)
    for i in range(1, n):
        tr[i] = max(high[i] - low[i], abs(high[i] - close[i-1]), abs(low[i] - close[i-1]))
        up = high[i] - high[i-1]
        down = low[i-1] - low[i]
        plus_dm[i] = up if up > down and up > 0 else 0
    atr = np.zeros(n)
    plus_di = np.zeros(n)
    atr[period] = np.sum(tr[1:period+1])
    plus_dm_sum = np.sum(plus_dm[1:period+1])
    for i in range(period + 1, n):
        atr[i] = atr[i-1] - atr[i-1]/period + tr[i]
        plus_dm_sum = plus_dm_sum - plus_dm_sum/period + plus_dm[i]
        plus_di[i] = 100 * plus_dm_sum / (atr[i] + 1e-10)
    return plus_di
helper_functions.MinusDI:
def MinusDI(high, low, close, period=14):
    """Minus Directional Indicator"""
    high = np.asarray(high, dtype=float)
    low = np.asarray(low, dtype=float)
    close = np.asarray(close, dtype=float)
    n = len(close)
    tr = np.zeros(n)
    minus_dm = np.zeros(n)
    for i in range(1, n):
        tr[i] = max(high[i] - low[i], abs(high[i] - close[i-1]), abs(low[i] - close[i-1]))
        up = high[i] - high[i-1]
        down = low[i-1] - low[i]
        minus_dm[i] = down if down > up and down > 0 else 0
    atr = np.zeros(n)
    minus_di = np.zeros(n)
    atr[period] = np.sum(tr[1:period+1])
    minus_dm_sum = np.sum(minus_dm[1:period+1])
    for i in range(period + 1, n):
        atr[i] = atr[i-1] - atr[i-1]/period + tr[i]
        minus_dm_sum = minus_dm_sum - minus_dm_sum/period + minus_dm[i]
        minus_di[i] = 100 * minus_dm_sum / (atr[i] + 1e-10)
    return minus_di
helper_functions.StdDev:
def StdDev(values, period=20):
    """Standard Deviation"""
    values = np.asarray(values, dtype=float)
    result = np.zeros_like(values)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(values)):
        result[i] = np.std(values[i - period + 1:i + 1])
    return result
helper_functions.RVI:
def RVI(open_, high, low, close, period=10):
    """Relative Vigor Index"""
    close = np.asarray(close, dtype=float)
    open_ = np.asarray(open_, dtype=float)
    high = np.asarray(high, dtype=float)
    low = np.asarray(low, dtype=float)
    num = close - open_
    den = high - low
    rvi = np.zeros_like(close)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(close)):
        rvi[i] = np.sum(num[i - period + 1:i + 1]) / (np.sum(den[i - period + 1:i + 1]) + 1e-10)
    return rvi
helper_functions.ChaikinOsc:
def ChaikinOsc(high, low, close, volume, fast=3, slow=10):
    """Chaikin Oscillator"""
    high = np.asarray(high, dtype=float)
    low = np.asarray(low, dtype=float)
    close = np.asarray(close, dtype=float)
    volume = np.asarray(volume, dtype=float)
    mfm = ((close - low) - (high - close)) / (high - low + 1e-10)
    mfv = mfm * volume
    adl = np.cumsum(mfv)
    return EMA(adl, fast) - EMA(adl, slow)
helper_functions.AcceleratorOsc:
def AcceleratorOsc(high, low, fast=5, slow=34, signal=5):
    """Accelerator Oscillator"""
    ao = AwesomeOsc(high, low, fast, slow)
    ao_sma = np.zeros_like(ao)
    for i in range(signal - 1, len(ao)):
        ao_sma[i] = np.mean(ao[i - signal + 1:i + 1])
    return ao - ao_sma
helper_functions.Envelopes:
def Envelopes(values, period=20, deviation=0.1):
    """Envelopes - returns (upper, lower)"""
    values = np.asarray(values, dtype=float)
    sma = np.zeros_like(values)
    for i in range(period - 1, len(values)):
        sma[i] = np.mean(values[i - period + 1:i + 1])
    upper = sma * (1 + deviation)
    lower = sma * (1 - deviation)
    return upper

ta_atr.init_code: self.atr = self.I(ATR, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.atr_period)

ta_macd.init_code:
self.macd_line = self.I(MACD_line, self.data.Close, self.macd_fast, self.macd_slow)
        self.macd_signal = self.I(MACD_signal, self.data.Close, self.macd_fast, self.macd_slow, self.macd_signal)

macd_value.init_code:
self.macd_line = self.I(MACD_line, self.data.Close, self.macd_fast, self.macd_slow)
        self.macd_signal = self.I(MACD_signal, self.data.Close, self.macd_fast, self.macd_slow, self.macd_signal_period)

ta_bb.init_code:
self.bb_upper = self.I(BollingerUpper, self.data.Close, self.bb_period, self.bb_std)
        self.bb_lower = self.I(BollingerLower, self.data.Close, self.bb_period, self.bb_std)
        self.bb_middle = self.I(BollingerMiddle, self.data.Close, self.bb_period)

ta_stochastic.init_code:
self.stoch_k = self.I(StochK, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.stoch_k)
        self.stoch_d = self.I(StochD, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.stoch_k, self.stoch_d)

ta_cci.init_code: self.cci = self.I(CCI, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.cci_period)

ta_williams_r.init_code: self.williams_r = self.I(WilliamsR, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.williams_period)

ta_adx.init_code: self.adx = self.I(ADX, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.adx_period)

ta_vwap.init_code: self.vwap = self.I(VWAP, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.data.Volume)

ta_supertrend.init_code: self.supertrend = self.I(SuperTrend, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.supertrend_period, self.supertrend_mult)

ta_sar.init_code: self.sar = self.I(ParabolicSAR, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.sar_step, self.sar_max)

donchian.init_code:
self.donchian_upper = self.I(DonchianUpper, self.data.High, self.donchian_period)
        self.donchian_lower = self.I(DonchianLower, self.data.Low, self.donchian_period)

ta_keltner.init_code:
self.keltner_upper = self.I(KeltnerUpper, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.keltner_period, self.keltner_mult)
        self.keltner_lower = self.I(KeltnerLower, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.keltner_period, self.keltner_mult)

ta_mfi.init_code: self.mfi = self.I(MFI, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.data.Volume, self.mfi_period)

ta_ichimoku.init_code:
self.ichimoku_tenkan = self.I(Ichimoku_Tenkan, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.ichimoku_tenkan)
        self.ichimoku_kijun = self.I(Ichimoku_Kijun, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.ichimoku_kijun)
        self.ichimoku_senkou_a = self.I(Ichimoku_SenkouA, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.ichimoku_tenkan, self.ichimoku_kijun)
        self.ichimoku_senkou_b = self.I(Ichimoku_SenkouB, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.ichimoku_senkou)

ta_dmi.init_code:
self.plus_di = self.I(PlusDI, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.dmi_period)
        self.minus_di = self.I(MinusDI, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.dmi_period)
        self.dmi_adx = self.I(ADX, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.dmi_period)

rvi.init_code: self.rvi = self.I(RVI, self.data.Open, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.rvi_period)

chaikin.init_code: self.chaikin = self.I(ChaikinOsc, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.data.Close, self.data.Volume, self.chaikin_fast, self.chaikin_slow)

ao.init_code: self.ao = self.I(AwesomeOsc, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.ao_fast, self.ao_slow)

ac.init_code: self.ac = self.I(AcceleratorOsc, self.data.High, self.data.Low, self.ac_fast, self.ac_slow)
